positive: A central, stylized celestial garden design. Focus on bioluminescent flora, delicate moon phases, constellations arranged like glowing vines, and minimalist, abstract cosmic elements. The main subject should be a highly detailed, symmetrical arrangement of glowing mushrooms, star clusters, and ethereal nebula clouds. The style should be a blend of intricate Art Nouveau and deep-sea bioluminescence, rendered with sharp vector lines and high contrast. Use a vibrant palette of deep indigo, cosmic purple, luminous teal, and subtle gold accents. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly scalable for apparel printing, featuring clean silhouettes and perfect circular composition.
negative: low quality, blurry, poorly drawn, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, blurry edges, jpeg compression, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, tiling, logo, typography
